textPlain: Stephen Biesty had some wonderful works I loved as a child.https://www.amazon.com/Stephen-Biestys-Incredible-Cross-Sect...It was great fun finding the toilet on each and every cross-sectioned exhibit. :D
Very cool! The book they mention looks pretty interesting:https://us.gestalten.com/products/look-inside

I loved the ‘Visual Dictionary’ of 2000s . Damn that booo is peak encyclopaedia, describing everything in amazing detail, I first read that book when I was 5. I have bought a second hand copy of that book for my future kids.
Dave Kimble was also well known for his cutaway artwork. https://www.hotrod.com/news/david-kimble-cutaway-x-ray-visio...

dang, looks all sold out online. Anyone have any leads?
